case_title: PECK, JOHN S. et al vs. CHAN, SIU YUK et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PECK, JOHN S. DWORAK-PECK, SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, SIU YUK CHAN, LISA DOES 1-30 SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
ORDER DEEMING COPIES OF COMPLAINT,STIP. AS ORIGINAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PECK, JOHN S. DWORAK-PECK, SUZANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, SIU YUK CHAN, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1046 MASON STREET, APT. #4, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT ISSUED IMMEDIATELY BUT STAY OF EXECUTION UNTIL 5:00PM ON NOVEMBER 30, 1993 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, SIU YUK CHAN, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1046 MASON STREET, APT. #4, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL NOV-30-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTYS FEES. EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT SHALL BE STAYED TO 30-NOV-93 5:00 PM. PLTFS MAY AT ANY TIME AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, APPLY FOR AND OBTAIN A WRIT OF EXECUTION. NO FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $30.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PECK, JOHN S.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, SIU YUK CHAN, LISA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, SIU YUK CHAN, LISA
